programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Planning to sail to Boston, the Major, Hawks and Charlie are instead shanghaied to New Orleans where they meet a Captain who has different ideas on raising his child and running a ship.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Jarrod’s client, Jeff Bowden, was convicted of the murder of a priest. Jarrod is convinced of the man’s innocence and sure he can win on appeal. When Bowden escapes during his transfer to prison, Jarrod tries to intervene before he or anyone else gets killed.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Hootie Kyle is a poor but honest farmer whose credit has run out. Matt Dillon and Festus lend him some money, only to be swindled out of it in a poker game. Later, Hootie gets circumstantially framed for the murder of the card shark who swindled him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Sgt. Samuel Bellis is accused of desertion, murder and selling guns to the Indians. Bellis insists that he's innocent, and Candy believes him, but before he can clear Bellis' name, he must elude the Army patrol hot on the fugitive sergeant's heels.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself the unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Stricken with a mysterious illness, the drovers stagger into a deserted town where they are met by a pretty yet strange woman.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: A British woman, Diana Coulter, hires Paladin to guide her to her brother's ranch in Shiprock, Arizona, where the Comanches are on the warpath.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh allows a newspaper reporter from the east to follow him on a manhunt for a story.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Three Little Pirates, Hugs And Mugs, Hold That Lion, Punchy Cowpunchers, Who Done It, Outer Space Jitters
programme.desc: "The Stooges are castaways from a garbage scow who land on Dead Man's Island where everyone is living in olden times. To escape from the governor, they disguise Curly as a Maharaja and win permission to journey to their own country to fetch presents. The governor is fooled, but the boys run into more trouble in the den of Black Louie the pirate where Curly is forced into a knife-throwing contest with Larry as the target. Things look bad until a mis-thrown knife cuts the rope that holds the chandelier and it crashes down on Black Louie's men. With the pirates defeated, Moe decides to take over as ruler of the island. , The Stooges run a furniture store and come into possession of a stolen pearl necklace. Three crooked dames convince the boys that the necklace is theirs, and when the real thieves arrive, the Stooges fight to defend the girl's property. The Stooges defeat the bad guys and the girls decide to go honest and return the necklace to its rightful owner. , The Stooges accompany professor Jones on an expedition to Venus, where they discover that the Venusians are planning to conquer the earth with an army of zombies. When the boys learn that they're going to be turned into zombies, they escape. The scene changes to the Stooges apartment where we learn they are just telling a bedtime story to their kids (also played by the Stooges) while they wait for the baby sitter to arrive. When the baby sitter shows up, she looks like one of the zombies and the boys exit in a hurry. , The Stooges are gypped out of their inheritance by Icabob Slipp, a crooked lawyer. The boys follow Slipp onto a passenger train and corner him, but not before they accidentally let a lion loose on the train. , Set in the old west, the Stooges are three soldiers assigned to go undercover and spy on an outlaw gang that's terrorizing a nearby town. The bad guys have the Arizona Kid locked up, so the boys set about rescuing him with the help of beautiful Nell, his girl. They free the kid, and he rides to summon help. The Stooges, with the help of Nell, manage to subdue the bad guys before the kid arrives with the cavalry. , The Stooges are private detectives looking for a missing millionaire. They wander around the millionaire's spooky mansion confronting various crooks and a dangerous dame. The Stooges vanquish the crooks (Shemp uses his "trusty shovel") and find the missing man. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Wolf Frankenstein, son of Henry Frankenstein, returns with his wife, to his fathers estate to claim his inheritance. When he arrives with his family he recieves a hostile reception from locals. While exploring his fathers laboratory he comes across crooked blacksmith - Ygor, who asks him to revive his father's creation - the MONSTER who is lying in a coma. Wolf tries to revive the monster and believes he fails but then some of the locals are found murdered soon after who just happened to be part of the jury that sent Ygor to the gallows. The villagers immediately connect the killings to Frankenstein and send the inspector to investigate. He discovers the monster is alive and is being used as tool by Ygor. Wolf then in fit of madness shoots Ygor. The then enraged monster losing his only friend kidnaps Wolf's son. In the end Wolf tracks the monster to the lab where he swings down on a chain knocking the monster into a sulpher pit and thus his demise."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Using her Voice-Eraser, Catwoman plans to steal the voices of British rock singers staying at the Wayne Manor.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk and the Enterprise must combat parasitic aliens.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy Olsen visits his aunt and discovers a group of smugglers on her island home.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Talkative Dummy
programme.desc: Armored cars are robbed and then disappear. A ventriloquist's dummy is used to transmit the armored cars' routes.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: "A person known as ' the thief from outer space' appears in a puff of smoke, will agrees to help him rescue a princess who was lost more than 200 years ago by evil vizier."

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: The Spindrift party encounter an amnesiac Earthling who has been stranded on the planet for some time. However, it soon becomes clear that the newcomer isn't what he claims.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: The travelers materialize in 1895 on Devil's Island, where they try to help French captain Alfred Dreyfus escape.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: David's personal life threatens his mission when aliens resort to foul play to recover a computer tape.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Little Eliza and her parents are headed out west. During a stop, she wanders off and they (unknowingly) leave without her."

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Little Eliza and her parents are headed out west. During a stop, she wanders off and they (unknowingly) leave without her."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "In the Sariska jungle in Rajasthan, northern India, a family of Bengal tigers have established their home. Marlin journeys to this distant land to observe the cats in their natural environment."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "The life story of the Adelie penguin, the principal inhabitant of this barren continent at the end of the earth."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin goes unarmed deep into the jungles of India to film the adventures of a full-grown Bengal tigress and her two young cubs."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Travel with Marlin and his band of adventurers as they explore the Golf of California, the last great unexplored marine paradise in the Western hemisphere, lying between the Mexican main land and Baja, California."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "There’s a legend that during the 16th century, Spanish ponies from a sinking galleon swam ashore to the island of Assateague, Virginia. Today, once a year, men from neighboring Chincoteague Island gather for one of the most unusual roundups."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin travels to Gir Forest in India in search of the king of beasts…the lion."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes extremely self conscious about his height and tries different ways to make himself "big." When there's a dangerous situation at Sam's Butcher Shop, though, Bobby is exactly the right size to save the day.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg, wanting to make a record, books a recording studio and plans on singing a song with his siblings. However, when Peter's voice begins to change, his hopes of recording are dashed. That is until Greg gets a new idea that just may accommodate Peter's changing voice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale gets Jed to back the Beverly Hills Ballet Company, and Jed figures that ballet is the perfect way to keep Granny, who is tired of getting “butler sassed,” among other things, in Beverly Hills. Jed gets her interested in the dance just as Mrs. Drysdale gets the money she needs to save the ballet company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to start her own boarding house. The Clampetts put out signs welcoming any incoming boarders and advertising what they offer. When the Drysdale's new butler, Arthur Pinckney, arrives in town he thinks the signs are meant as a welcome for him so he goes to the Clampetts' mansion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is goaded into ticketing the governor's car and mistakenly believes Andy is setting him up for a dressing-down by the governor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes pedal their way from Italy to the French Riviera. It's a bumpy ride, thanks (of course) to Lucy, who left her passport in her purse, which she locked in a suitcase, which she sent ahead to their hotel in Nice.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver comes home with a black eye and Ward is upset when he learns that Beaver didn't fight back. This leads Ward to teach Beaver how to defend himself. Little does Ward know, the person who punched Beaver is a girl, Violet Rutherford, the daughter of one of Ward's co-workers.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver's teacher, Miss Canfield, sends a note home with Beaver and the other kids convince him that it's news that he's getting kicked out of school. So Beaver and Wally take steps to hide the note from Ward and June."

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: A recruit in the Women's Army Corps is shot to death on the firing range and Charlie's Angels are assigned to investigate.

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: "The mysterious death of a scientist at a Hart-owned chemical company risks exposing a pair of chemists who have created a powerful new hallucinogen."

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.sub-title: Poof, You're A Movie Star / Over The Hill Caper
programme.desc: "Attractive Miss Shirley Russell wants to become a movie star. Roarke has arrange everything including a press party to announce the signing of her contract with Arthur Gantman, the Studio Chief, for her new picture, "Wayward Wife." Her co-star is handsome Desmond Vaughn. After a very late date with Desmond, Shirley is awakened at 5 A.M. by Liz Perry, her press agent, and taken to the studio. By 6:00 she is working on her first scene, which requires a dozen takes. She is exhausted, but Liz gives her the day's itinerary -lunch, fan club meeting and another date with Desmond. Shirley is beginning to have her doubts about the movie business. The morning's work is finished and a demolished Shirley is changing for her lunch date with Gantman when Roarke appears with a surprise. Shirley's fiancée, Bill Windsor, has arrived from Omaha to share her fantasy."

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: "A model goes on a crash diet to fit into a dress, a husband tries to win back his wife, and a father and long-lost daughter end up on the same cruise."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Big businessman Malcolm Tucker is stuck in Mayberry on a Sunday when his car breaks down outside the city limits. He's soon driven to frustration when he finds there is no way to get anything done until the following day.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.sub-title: Ashley Bevilacqua-berton & Anne Olivares- Drew Barrymore Memorabilia
programme.desc: "Ashley & Anne are what you might call Drewbie's-fans and collector's of Drew Barrymore. Their friendship grew out of their love for all things Drew, and has culminated in an online museum which they call the Drewseum. Today, they'll show Lisa some of her most iconic items, including the prom dress she wore in Never Been Kissed and even some personal Christmas items Ashley received from Drew's own production company. Our expert today, Patrick Scott Patterson is also a Drew fan and collector who'll be tasked with appraising the ladies' collection."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger discovers that his duties as company clerk include catering to the eccentric whims of the 4077th officers. Consequently, the unusual demands by Klinger's superiors leave little time to write a letter home to Toledo.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A brawl at Rosie's Bar puts Rosie in the hospital, and the 4077th doctors are pressed into service as temporary saloon-keepers. Meanwhile, Father Mulcahy is apprehensive that his long-pending promotion to captain will again be denied.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Archie's brother, Fred, visits Archie to open up a business, he also brings his 18 year old wife, Katherine. Both, Archie and Edith, and even Stephanie, are shocked as they find out. While the new bride and Edith cook supper, Archie and Fred argue about Katherine's age. Before dinner, Fred (and Katherine) leave the Bunker's home, canceling the business. In bed, Edith asks Archie if he were a single 55 year old man, would he go for a young girl. Archie answers no.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After Stephanie comes back from Sunday School, Rev. Chong visits Edith to tell her that even though she is welcome anytime at Sunday School, Stephanie is Jewish. Edith accepts it, unlike Archie. Selfishly, Archie decides to change Stephanie's religion but Edith interrupts that it's not his decision. So Edith brings Archie and herself to visit a Rabbi to get more information of the religion. Later that night, Stephanie awaits at the porch for the return of Edith and Archie. She and her uncle discuss and he approves that it's her decision and whatever religion she'll be, he'll love her the way he has.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When an ill woman tells Edith to let her die with dignity at the SunShine Home, the woman's family are furious after her death. The manager fires Edith for her selfishness, even though Edith honoured the woman's wish. Later that night, the woman's daughter thanks Edith to be with her mother as she passed away since she (the daughter) never got to visit her own mother back then.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Louise Jefferson returns for a visit at the Bunker's place to ask Edith if she can sell her (Louise's) former house. Edith doubts but Archie makes her agree so that they (mostly he) can choose white people to move in. When Edith sells the house to a couple and she invites the lady to her house, Archie realises that the woman is black and so is her husband. But Archie isn't disturbed when he finds out that the man is a cop, which could be good for Archie's safety.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond gains a new respect for his brother, Robert.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally, claiming that there are monsters in her room, insists on sleeping in her parent's bed.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura gets jealous when Rob spends too much time trying to help an old friend break into showbusiness.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: Will You Two Be My Wife?
programme.desc: Buddy and Sally discovers Rob's memoir and discover there was a woman before Laura.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ed handcuffs himself to Ralph on their way to the Raccoon convention.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While aboard a commercial aircraft, a man believes he is seeing a gremlin on its wing.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A number of women have been victims of ritualistic murders, and a medical undergraduate thinks she's next.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An $8 million army payroll has been stolen from a base in Southeast Asia by the Stafford family, who are Syndicate drug smugglers. The IMF must recover the money. Jim and Barney steal a Stafford truck and then offer to sell it back to the family if they pay "protection."

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is working as the "general factotum" in a swank Beverly Hills hotel on Sunset Blvd. An undercover policeman, named Fred Bragin, checks into the hotel to survey Eddie Slade, a notorious mob bookie. When Slade leaves town for a few days to sort out s

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry O runs into a deadly conspiracy when he tries to clear a deaf man charged with arson and murder."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon track down a department store employee who stole $100,000 worth of merchandise in six months.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives search out the suppliers of stolen arms for paramilitary groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While transporting a burglar to the station with Malloy's assistance, Sgt. MacDonald strikes and kills a jaywalker with his cruiser, but unfortunately all of the witnesses on the sidewalk inexplicably claim she was in the crosswalk. With the burglar unmotivated to testify on MacDonald's behalf, Malloy has to take it upon himself to clear his boss.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed try to curb a chronic street racing problem by befriending the club leaders and working with a racing promoter to open a legitimate drag strip. Their efforts, along with a highly anticipated race between reed and officer wells, are put in

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony sign up to compete in an outhouse race."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Wally and his friends are trying to earn enough money to buy baseball uniforms so they put a plan into action by doing their chores at a slow pace in order to maximize their hourly pay. Meanwhile, Beaver, also wanting to be on the team, begins selling water to his family and neighbors."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver dread attending dance school, so when Wally suddenly takes a liking in it, June and Ward are dumbfounded. It seems Wally has developed a crush on a girl named Penny and Beaver soon feels neglected and left out when Wally begins spending all his time with her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Hateful Hero
programme.desc: Young cop Jimmy Anderson and his veteran partner come across a robbery at the Wilson Plastics Company while on patrol one night. His partner killed in the ensuing shootout, evidence then points to Jimmy as having been an accomplice.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is hired by a friend to defend his enlisted son. The boy's been charged with killing a sadistic lieutenant whose mistreatment led to the death of another soldier.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: An opposition leader for Greece is living in exile in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister in law is being forced out of their home by a government project.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After eight years in a prison for robbery, a farmer returns home and hopes to find the stolen fortune he had buried under a tree.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.sub-title: A Hot Day For A Hanging
programme.desc: On behalf of his father, Hoss sets out to deliver a large sum of money to the town of Dutchman Flats. Upon his arrival, however, Hoss is arrested by Sheriff Stedman on a charge of bank robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for escape after he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Juan awakens to the sound of three men hanging his beloved father. Joining the wagon train, he comes across one of the three, tortured by Indians. He nurses him back to health but only under the guise of looking for the other two killers.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: After John and Roy rescue an elderly transient from a fire, Chet and Marco discover $80,000 in the man's mattress. A bride faints while walking down the aisle. Dixie administers a tetanus shot to a young boy. An elderly woman loses her cat. A plane crashes into a warehouse.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Friction arises between B.J. and Winchester when they are asked to write an article for a prestigious medical journal on how they saved a soldier's life with a daring operation. Meanwhile, Hot Lips receives an eventful visit from Scully.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A baby born to a Korean woman and an American GI is abandoned at the 4077th. Knowing that Amer-Asian children are often mistreated in Korean society, the troop sets about the frustrating task of finding a new home for the infant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Horrified by the gigantic size of his monthly bar tab at the officer's club, Hawkeye vows to give up booze for a week. Meanwhile, Winchester desperately tries to halt his sister's impending marriage to a man he considers unworthy of the Winchester heritage.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter turns crotchety when he catches the mumps, and his condition is worsened when Winchester gets the same disease and has to be quarantined with him. A temporary replacement surgeon, Newsome, is quickly brought into the 4077th and seems to be a gem in terms of both personality and ability.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gets hysterical when Andy receives a letter from a man he arrested and sent to prison. The convict is to be released soon and says in the letter that he is coming to settle the score with Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An escaped goat eats a case of dynamite that was going to be used for blasting and puts Mayberry in danger—especially when Otis Campbell gets drunk.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra discovers that Marie, likes Robert's girlfriend, Amy, better.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra brings an "unapproved snack" to Ally's T-ball game.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan learns his underground contact may be a double agent after he arranges for her to go to England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Right after Hogan helps a journalist escape from the Germans, an American paper tells of Hogan's operations at his camp.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Drum-Out, Sergeant Harvey is dishonorably discharged, but Officer Tim can't do it without fumbling around. Then, in The Pronie, an woman cured from her klutzy behavior meets head on with an accident-prone nurse. Finally, in Stick 'Em Up, Please, a bank robber and bank teller instruct their inexperienced protege, falling in love at the same time.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Petulant Partner
programme.desc: Harry Bright and Chuck Clark were once best friends and business partners until Margaret entered the picture. Margaret was a much younger woman on the make who entranced Chuck into marrying her. When Margaret is found shot to death, Harry is arrested for murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is given a stopwatch that allows him to halt time.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: When the husband of an unhappy marriage disappears, the neighbors suspect foul play.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.sub-title: Santa Claus And The Tenth Avenue Kid
programme.desc: A criminal fresh out of prison takes a job as Santa Claus for the holiday season.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Winifred, private secretary and lover of the publisher George Diamond, becomes a runaway witness when a woman falls into the sea and drowns after a quarrel.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon gets hired to protect a girl but when her supposed pursuer is found dead he finds himself charged with murder."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby probes the supposed suicide of a college professor who had been the victim of his student's pranks.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The problems of policemen's wives.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police go after a college student who has turned to murder.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed search for a six-year-old boy who was apparently abducted while walking home from school, and later fear that an elderly witness's wildly inaccurate account may actually pertain to a different crime. They also respond to a barking dog complaint and become suspicious of the dog's owner, mediate a domestic dispute caused by a husband's obsession with watching football, respond to a very creative college prank and pursue armed robbery suspects through a crowded train depot with the aid of a police helicopter.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed becomes preoccupied with the well being of a friend, an electrical engineer by profession, who has just qualified as a reserve police officer and has the bad luck of drawing Officer Wells as his partner. On patrol, Reed and Malloy help out a group of distrusting young adults who are planning to illegally camp in a public park after a rock concert, pull over a young couple in a stolen car and aid wells and the reservist in the foot chase of a heavily armed man who has been coercing innocent strangers into committing bank robberies.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After taking an IQ test, Beaver scores the highest in his class and Mrs. Rayburn suggests that it would be best if Beaver went to a special school, where his abilities can be challenged. However, little does anyone know, everything is not as it seems.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: The Cleavers have new neighbors, the Donaldsons, and June sends Beaver over to welcome them with a vase of flowers. However, when Mrs. Donaldson thanks Beaver by kissing him on the cheek, Beaver becomes convinced that Mr. Donaldson will kill him because he let a married woman kiss him, and it's all thanks to Eddie Haskell, who planted that idea in Beaver's mind.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Dodging Domino
programme.desc: Phil Schuyler is a two-bit songwriter who comes to a bad end on Halloween night. Someone enters his bungalow while Phil is taking a bath and tosses an electric heater into his tub.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: As the murder case involving the death of a sadistic Army lieutenant progresses, Matlock discovers that the lieutenant and four other officers may have been involved in smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: When a lawyer is murdered, his wife becomes the top suspect and McGarrett investigates. However, matters are complicated by the fact that the woman had a relationship with McGarrett, and he jeopardizes his job because of this.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Everything seems to go wrong on John-Boy's first day at Boatwright University

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: All of Dodge City is suffering from a drought. A rainmaker (Guy Raymond) tries to put an end to it before the town's public well, their last source of water, runs dry.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a man comes to town claiming to be Marie's son, Joe is not sure what to think. Could this be his brother, or is it all just a big lie?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah has an infamous outlaw, Charlie Gordo, in his jail waiting for the U.S. marshal from Denver to take Gordo to the Yuma prison for hanging. With the arrival of the stage, Micah finds that the lawman has been killed, and he has to look to his friends to defend the jail from Gordo's gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas' old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Jennifer Churchill, pampered all her life, runs away from a smothering lifestyle and pending marriage to join the wagon train. With bounty hunters on her heels, she finds Flint, a man who she wants but doesn't want her.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Everyone gives Roy advice on where to go on vacation. Roy gets dizzy during a fire at a singles club. An instructor is injured during a self-defense class. A man with stomach pains is brought into Rampart. The firemen rescue two hang glider pilots from the face of a cliff.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is appointed temporary commander of the 4077th when Colonel Potter rushes off to Tokyo on a mysterious mission. While in command, Hawkeye's main problem is housing a large group of Korean refugees comprised mainly of rambunctious children who need medical care.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Tired of their constant complaints about the quality of recreational activities at the 4077th, Colonel Potter appoints Hawkeye and B.J. as the new morale officers. Winchester's morale has already reached a new peak: He's ecstatic about his operation on a wounded soldier, Sheridan, which saved the boy's leg, leaving only "negligible" side effects—less use of his right hand. However, the soldier was a concert pianist before the war.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Irritated that the 4077th is planning a "surprise" party for him, Hawkeye volunteers to go to the aid of a wounded surgeon at the front. An additional irritant to Hawkeye is the arrival of Dr. Borelli, a wisecracking medical advisor with whom he habitually disagrees.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger redecorates his quarters, but the resultant ridicule he receives drives him to new heights in his efforts to get out of the Army. Meanwhile, the doctors are perplexed by the reaction of an Asian-American war hero who tries to kill himself.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy meets up with his high school sweetheart at their reunion and it appears they could be rekindling their relationship. But do they want the same things, and did they ever?

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rafe Hollister, a simple farmer with an incredible voice, is encouraged by Andy to enter the Mayberry singing contest, much to the dismay of the mayor and other officials.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's students complain that his class causes severe insomnia.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tries to teach Raymond how to have a "normal" mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A U.S. undercover agent helps Hogan and his men get a defecting Nazi officer out of Berlin.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Will The Blue Baron Strike Again?
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to throw a party for WW I flying ace Blue Baron in order to find his headquarters.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Career Couple, a career-obsessed couple tries to fit each other into their schedule. Then, in Riddles, Carol gets aggravated when Vicki won't tell her the answer to a riddle. Finally, in Mrs. Wiggins, Mr. Tudball tries to teach Mrs. Wiggins how to use an intercom.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Dangerous Dowager
programme.desc: Matilda Benson is a tough old broad who rules her children with an iron hand and the promises in her will. When Benson and her brood become involved in a gambling scandal and the death of a nightclub owner, Mason looks into the matriarch's matter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Last Night Of A Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A dishonest ex-museum curator uses a forged letter to get close to an elderly woman and her priceless vase.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Benjamin Stepp turns into a cold-blooded murderer after being fired from his job.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix searches for Australian sailor Paul Gantry, who is supposedly due to inherit a million dollars.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A military general hires Cannon to find the daughter he put up for adoption years ago but it appears as though someone doesn't want the girl to be found.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The two amateur singers that Barnaby put in jail escape and head for Nashville.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon recruit a woman cop to nab a burglar.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate cases in a hospital emergency ward.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A rash of purse snatching leads Malloy and Reed to investigate a motorcycle gang. Determined to convince the gang he has not prejudged them, Malloy challenges their leader to a motocross duel at Indian Dunes.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy finds himself attracted to the new girl in the steno pool, and decides to ask her on a date after learning she's Officer Wells' 25-year-old niece. Out on patrol, he and Reed investigate a report of a prowler in a heavily wooded neighborhood, make a deal with a flower vendor before booking him for unpaid tickets, engage in a high-speed pursuit with a green corvette and investigate a suspicious gardener.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After losing his lunch money three days in a row, Ward gives Beaver one last chance by letting him handle his haircut money. However, when he loses that too, Beaver decides to give himself a haircut just days before he's scheduled to be an angel in a play.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June has had it with Wally and Beaver's fighting and demands they make a pact to be nice to one another and do things together. However, when each boy gets an invitation for individual social outings, they each attempt to break the pact.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Unsuitable Uncle
programme.desc: An unscrupulous uncle, who is in reality the father of his niece, returns home from the sea seeking money from the sale of oil leases on his land. When the man is found murdered, his shipmate is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend a popular actor accused of killing the owner of a sex-therapy clinic at which he was staying. Meanwhile, the lawyer also finds himself hounded by a law student looking for a job.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: Shortly after giving a recital, the priceless Guarnerius violin of a visiting Russian virtuoso is stolen. McGarrett must retrieve it before the theft turns into an international incident.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Boy and his mule aim to get the Walton family name on a local race's trophy for the first time since Grandpa won the race years ago.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc Adams takes up arms to defend a gold shipment from bandits, first during a stagecoach ambush and then at a weigh station. He is aided by a blind man and a wounded man in the battle against the bandits.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss faces scorn and accusations of bribery when he refuses to vote with his fellow jurors to convict a man for murder based solely on the testimony of the victim's brother, who witnessed the act on a dark night.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle—and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction—a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Major Adams allows two stowaways, Tobias Jones and his young friend, Midge, to stay with the train. But Tobias is in trouble because of his drinking, and things get worse when he's accused of murder.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The crew finds a droopy-eyed hound dog in the station; at an industrial fire, Gage and DeSoto check a secret room for victims; a "therapeutic" argument between a husband and wife keeps getting out of hand; while attempting to rescue two injured workers, Johnny is trapped in a tunnel cave-in.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th can't escape the Korean War, even in its dreams. Exhausted after two days without sleep, members of the 4077th steal away for catnaps and experience dreams that reveal their fears, yearnings and frustrations.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. finds himself attracted to a famous war correspondent, Aggie O'Shea, who has fallen in love with him.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Angered by the way civilian doctors in the States are profiting from the war, Hawkeye presents the Army with a bill for his medical services. Meanwhile, Charles reluctantly demonstrates American medical practices to three Korean medics, and is on the receiving end of their medical expertise.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On his way to some R&R in Tokyo, a North Korean soldier forces Hawkeye to perform an emergency roadside operation on his buddy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Arnold the spoiled kid moves to town, he thinks he can walk all over the townsfolk, including Andy and Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A young man is accused of being the mysterious crook who's been robbing Wally's filling station. Andy and Barney try to determine his guilt or innocence in a variety of methods.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond and Debra take a walk back in time -- to the very beginning.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray fears that Debra is more interested in the wedding than in him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Colonel Klink Please Stand Up Against The Wall?
programme.desc: When Carter, in disguise as the camp kommandant, is seen near one of Hogan's operations, Klink is threatened with a treason charge.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is ordered to capture LeBeau, but not before he lets him complete his mission.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In A Swiped Life, the gang parodies "A Stolen Life" with Carol as Bette Davis' role of twin sisters with opposite personalities who get confused for each other.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Deadly Toy
programme.desc: Martin Selkirk is a major league rotter who wants Claire Allison in the worst way, even though she's dating Dirk Benedict. Selkirk has Dirk's jaw broken and begins sending Claire threatening mail. Then Selkirk is murdered in his beach house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man buys an alibi so he can murder his girlfriend.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A crazy man holds a woman hostage in her farmhouse while he plans his escape from the area.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A man hires Mannix to locate a dead body. The twist is that the client is the murderer, a contract killer who wants to clean up after himself, and Mannix somehow fits into his scheme.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "An ex-convict boards an airplane in Atlanta for a reunion with his daughter but when the plane lands he's nowhere to be found."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An aspiring robber is declared a hero for facing his double-crossing partner.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police zero in on a rat: a forger, bigamist and thief who even robs from the blind.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday investigates the junior high drug scene.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While on duty in a rural area, Reed and Malloy request the assistance of the DEA to build a case against the smug pilot of a light plane whom they suspect is involved in a drug smuggling operation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed transport an unconscious 8-year-old boy to Rampart General Hospital and help him and his parents cope with the ordeal. Afterwards, they assist a child welfare hotline operator locate a 15-year-old girl who has intentionally overdosed on pills, and then race to find the boy they brought in earlier after he escapes from the hospital.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver want to win a fancy film projector and in order to get it they have to sell 24 bottles of perfume. However, the appalling aroma of the perfume quickly leads to zero sales and has Ward trying to think up a sales gimmick.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and his friends build a clubhouse, and Beaver wants to join. Although the dues are $1 for 8th graders, Beaver has to come up with $3 in order to join their club. How can Beaver earn the money?

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Stand-in Sister
programme.desc: Two brothers, one a businessman, one a mobster, at separate times have claimed the same young girl as their daughter. Trouble follows when it is revealed that $100,000 due to the girl via a trust fund has been mishandled.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While defending a union boss (Dan Keaton) accused of murdering a rival, a juror (Harry Craven) comes forward with a bombshell: he claims Matlock paid him off to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: Five-O's efforts to rescue a young boy from kidnappers go wrong when Kono is captured and beaten. An angry McGarrett must work out a way to rescue Kono without further endangering him.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Everyone in the Walton house is too busy to pay attention Jim Bob so he takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Lars Karlgren, a Scandinavian immigrant and his teenage son, Petter, find the west even wilder than they had imagined when they settle in Dodge City. Petter gets framed for the murder of a man who was picking a fight with him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Mexican freedom fighters loyal to Benito Juárez take over the Ponderosa, gravely wound Little Joe and force Ben to guide them to a wagon train loaded with gold being smuggled to California by Emperor Maximilian.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sammy Davis Jr. stars as Tip Corey, son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On the trail Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers. Bantry kills Ab Richards, and Len wants Micah to arrest Lucas for the murder. More problems ensue because of this "evil twin."

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Liam Fitzmorgan has come from Ireland on a mission to kill an informer he believes is traveling with the train. However, his mission is complicated when he falls in love with his target's daughter.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A driver crashes into a pole, injuring two workers. John and Roy are asked to be on a paramedic advisory committee, but they have to put up with everyone's favorite paramedic, Brice. The firemen rescue a stunt climber from the side of a building.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Members of the 4077th share their impressions of war in response to letters from fourth graders in Hawkeye's hometown. Margaret writes about how there are some patients she will never forget, while the Colonel tells of his days as "Hoops."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A jilted Italian soldier, Corpsman Ignazio De Simone, is smitten by Margaret; Klinger pours a cement floor in the operating room to fight the spread of germs.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret has trouble pretending she's a chip off the old block when her dad, blood and guts "Howitzer" Al Houlihan, arrives for a visit. Also, Hawkeye fixes up a soldier who repays them with a large side of steak, but the general who it belongs to is really steamed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester fulfills a family Christmas tradition but has trouble maintaining the anonymity required to keep it a truly charitable act. Even Klinger lends a hand.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie doesn't like his new teacher, "Old Lady Crump," because she gives too much homework. Andy comments on the teacher, words which Opie twists in his retelling to Ms. Crump, and she is furious.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry is visited by an unusual family from the mountains.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gets upset that Debra doesn't want to have any more children.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond moves his entire family into his parent's house.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to kidnap Burkhalter to trade him for an underground agent but ends up with Klink.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Who Stole My Copy Of Mein Kampf?
programme.desc: Hogan plans to eliminate a beautiful allied defector who is giving Klink an award.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Strickly For The Birds / Fun In A Drugstore
programme.desc: In Strictly for the Birds, Harvey tries to hurray a bird feeding Carol along. Then, in Fun in a Drugstore, Tim gives Harvey the run-around while filling a prescription. Finally, in The Cruise, a hum-drum secretary dreams of a shipboard romance.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Spanish Cross
programme.desc: Young Jimmy Morrow can't seem to catch a break. Already on probation for car theft, he's charged with stealing a valuable Spanish cross and killing its owner. Mason feels sorry for the kid and decides to take the case.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Old Man In The Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after nuclear war destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A reporter discovers the truth about the infamous Lizzie Borden murder case.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two retired sales clerks test their theory that people become killers at 92 degrees.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: Only One Death To A Customer
programme.desc: After escaping three consecutive attempts on his life, Mannix learns that someone has placed a $5,000 bounty on his head.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon is a victim of mistaken identity and later almost killed."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A runaway thinks she committed a murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A murder victim's smoking habits help Friday track down the killer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A high school student is missing.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After completing a hazardous driving refresher course, Sgt. MacDonald assigns Malloy and Reed to a nighttime undercover bicycle patrol to test Officer Wells' idea on how to deal with a rash of residential car break-ins. The next day, they pull over a hippie with an obnoxious passenger, and then put their refreshed driving skills to the test when called to a burglary in progress at a new car showroom.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed puts his reputation on the line when he decides to file a formal complaint against a fellow officer after witnessing him use excessive force. On patrol, he and Malloy search for suspects in two separate robberies.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: When June goes on a trip to visit her sister, Peggy, June's Aunt Martha steps in and stays with Ward and the boys. They do their best not to hurt Martha's feelings, but Beaver has the hardest time, when she buys him a suit, knee socks, a cap and short pants and makes him wear the outfit to school.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has a crush on his teacher, Miss Canfield. When Judy, Whitey and Larry tease him for being a "teacher's pet," Beaver tries to prove them wrong and places a spring snake in her desk. However, Beaver has second thoughts and becomes determined to remove the snake before she finds it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Weary Watchdog
programme.desc: Della asks Mason for $25,000 to help her friend, Janet Brent, who is being blackmailed by an employee of her husband, who has staged compromising photos of her in a motel.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes pro bono to help a troubled young woman accused of murdering her photographer boss.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: A ruthless businessman is blown up in a boat explosion.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: In this episode, John Boy encourages his mother, Olivia's, talent in painting

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The identity of a criminal is confused with that of Deputy Marshal Thad when a Quaker party rescues the pair from a do-or-die fight.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss picks up a mail order bride for a friend, but problems arise when the bride decides she has fallen in love with Hoss and has no interest in her husband to be.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is on the trail escorting a prisoner scheduled to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner, Mr. Renolds, as someone who saved Mark's life from a snake bite a few years back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A professional card player, John Keeler, has set up business in North Fork, but local Jesse Phillips claims that this tinhorn is a cheat. Lucas starts playing poker with Keeler to draw him out.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Concerned by one of the passengers on the wagon train, a woman doctor tries to help even though she's hampered by the fact that everyone shuns her. Later, an indian chief needs doctoring, but he and his tribe don't believe in female medicine men either.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John and Roy worry about their recertification exams. A fireman's widow keeps calling the station for assistance in minor matters. A TV sports fan experiences shortness of breath. The daughter of the fireman’s widow suffers a serious fall. An accident on a movie set turns deadly.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, the staff looks back on the highlights of 1951: The doctors invent an artificial kidney machine; Mulcahy plants a garden; Margaret takes up knitting; and Klinger and Winchester bet on which baseball team will win the pennant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger is so depressed by news that his ex-wife plans to remarry, he reenlists for an additional six-year stretch. Meanwhile, a male nurse has a gripe against the Army.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester takes command during Potter's absence; and B.J. and Hawkeye try to convince the Marines to grant a hardship discharge to an immigrant soldier, Private Jost Van Liter.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye uses a bottle of vintage wine to lure unsuspecting nurses into his den; and Potter tries to secure a different sort of anesthetic when the army threatens to ban a painkiller.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A tourist from England has to do chores to pay off a fine.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney uses his life savings of $300 to buy a car, which almost immediately begins to break down.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides that the kids can't ride with Frank anymore.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides to get a babysitter.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and the daughter of a German general try to photograph her father's plans designed to prolong the war.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A baroness is asked by Klink to get secrets out of Hogan, and he complies by giving her a British agent with phony invasion plans.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Eunice and Mama go to an elegant restaurant and feel the pressure to put on airs. Then, in The Oldest Man, a bank robber is chased by the Oldest Man in the Wild West.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Dubious Bridegroom
programme.desc: Mason returns to his office late one night and finds an attractive woman climbing into his balcony window. She claims to be Virginia Colfax, the secretary of Ed Garvin, who has an office next door to Mason's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After her mean-spirited uncle dies, an old maid inherits the crotchety inventor's estate, with the stipulation that she cares for his latest invention, a robot.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Ralph is having monetary problems and his wife has just bought a mink coat. To make matters worse, two bums are blackmailing him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A ventriloquist with a very lifelike puppet is accused of a murder at a vaudeville theater.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is asked to clear a psychotherapist charged with murder and robbery, the main witness being an autistic girl.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon is called in to investigate police corruption by the mayor of a Midwestern town."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates a TV reporter who fakes stories just to get big ratings.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: He Loves Us, He Loves Us Not
programme.desc: The Bradley girls all think handsome crop-duster Steve Elliott is in love with them.
